extension.name: Phala Outcome Protocol
extension.description: Outcome events, satisfaction records, and belief-update propagation for A2A networks.

AdjustmentBounds.description: Declared minimum and maximum for a weight, for Update-Boundedness.
AdjustmentBounds.title: AdjustmentBounds

agent_card_payload_schema.description:
Phala-specific fields contributed to an A2A AgentCard.

Validators detect Phala support by the presence of an entry in
``capabilities.extensions[]`` whose ``uri`` equals ``PHALA_EXTENSION_URI``.
The body of that entry SHOULD deserialize to this model.

version.description: Phala protocol semver this agent implements (e.g. '1.0.0').
version.title: Version

outcome_endpoint.description: HTTPS URL where OutcomeEvents originating from this agent are POSTed. Read-back endpoint per OE-1 (every terminal task MUST produce exactly one OutcomeEvent).
outcome_endpoint.title: Outcome Endpoint

satisfaction_endpoint.description: HTTPS URL where SatisfactionRecords are POSTed for outcomes produced by this agent.
satisfaction_endpoint.title: Satisfaction Endpoint

belief_update_endpoint.description: HTTPS URL where BeliefUpdates targeting this agent are POSTed. REQUIRED so peers can deliver the propagated weight deltas the Phala learning loop depends on. Per BU-3 the agent MAY ignore individual updates, but the endpoint MUST exist and accept POST.
belief_update_endpoint.title: Belief Update Endpoint

weight_keys.description: Stable namespace of weight keys this agent will accept on a BeliefUpdate. Updates targeting unknown keys MAY be discarded.
weight_keys.title: Weight Keys

learning_rate.description: Base learning rate applied to BeliefUpdates this agent emits. Effective rate is modulated by the agent's WelfareTrace per WT-2.
learning_rate.title: Learning Rate

weight_bounds.description: Per-weight clipping range for ``weight_delta``. All emitted BeliefUpdates MUST land within these bounds.

agent_card_payload_schema.title: PhalaServiceRef

invariants: OE-1: every terminal task MUST produce exactly one OutcomeEvent.
BU-1: BeliefUpdates MUST NOT carry raw signal_components.
WT-1: WelfareTraces are on-device only; never transmitted.
